channel.title: OpenHR
channel.description: Articles, guides, and product updates from OpenHR — the open-source HR management system.

item.title: Exporting Employee Data
item.description: How to export your employee directory as CSV for data analysis or branded PDF for stakeholder sharing.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Subscription and Upgrade Options
item.description: OpenHRApp's subscription model explained — Trial, Donation tiers, Ad-Supported free tier, and what happens when your trial expires.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Understanding the Dashboard
item.description: A detailed tour of OpenHRApp's role-based dashboard — what each widget shows for Employees, Managers, and Admins.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Configuring Notification Settings
item.description: How to configure email notifications, enable or disable notification types, set up SMTP, and manage notification retention.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Custom Leave Types and Special Leave
item.description: Understanding all leave types in OpenHRApp — Maternity, Paternity, Earned, Unpaid, half-day leave, and custom-configured types.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Theme Customization
item.description: Personalize OpenHRApp with 14 color themes, dark mode, light mode, and system preference — saved across devices.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Notifications — Bell Notifications and Admin Management
item.description: How OpenHRApp's bell and email notification system works, what events trigger notifications, and how admins manage them.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Announcements — Viewing and Creating
item.description: How to view organization announcements in OpenHRApp, and how Admins can create, target, and manage company-wide communications.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Performance Reviews — HR Calibration
item.description: How HR calibrates performance reviews, assigns final overall ratings, manages review cycles, and completes the process.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Performance Reviews — For Managers
item.description: How managers review employee self-assessments, provide competency ratings and feedback, and submit for HR calibration.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Performance Reviews — Employee Self-Assessment
item.description: How to complete your self-assessment in OpenHRApp — rate competencies, add comments, and submit for manager review.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Install OpenHRApp as an App (PWA) on Android and iOS
item.description: Install OpenHRApp on your phone or desktop as a Progressive Web App (PWA) — no app store download required.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Roles and Permissions in OpenHRApp
item.description: Complete guide to OpenHR's role-based access control — what Admin, HR, Manager, Team Lead, and Employee roles can access.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Managing Your Profile and Settings
item.description: How to view your employee profile, update your name and email, change your password, and customize your app theme.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Generating Reports
item.description: How to generate attendance and leave reports in OpenHRApp, export as CSV or PDF, and email summaries to stakeholders.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Setting Up Your Organization
item.description: Complete admin guide to configuring departments, teams, shifts, GPS locations, leave policies, holidays, and workflows in OpenHRApp.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Managing Employees — Adding and Editing Staff
item.description: How admins add new employees, assign roles and departments, manage the employee directory, and export staff data.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Understanding Leave Policies
item.description: How leave types, balances, quotas, approval workflows, and holiday exclusions are configured in OpenHRApp.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Leave Approval — For HR and Admins
item.description: How HR and Admin users verify, approve, reject, and manage leave records with admin override capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Leave Approval — For Managers
item.description: How managers review, approve, or reject leave requests from direct reports in OpenHR's multi-step approval workflow.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: How to Apply for Leave
item.description: Step-by-step guide to applying for leave in OpenHR — check your balance, submit a request, and track the approval status.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Attendance for Admins — Audit and Manual Entries
item.description: How admins can audit attendance records, edit clock-in times, create manual entries, and mark employees as absent.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: The Complete Guide to OpenHRApp: Free Open Source HR Software That Actually Works
item.description: Managing human resources shouldn't require an enterprise budget. OpenHRApp is a free, open source HR management system built for growing organizations with 100 to 500 employees. It delivers online attendance tracking with selfie verification and GPS geofencing, multi-tier leave approval workflows, structured performance reviews, and a full employee directory — all self-hosted on a single-file PocketBase backend. This step-by-step guide walks you through everything from initial setup to daily operations, covering how employees check in, how managers approve leave, and how HR runs the entire organization from one lightweight platform.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Understanding Your Attendance Logs
item.description: How to view your personal attendance history, understand attendance status badges, and read consolidated daily records.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: How to Clock In and Out
item.description: A complete guide to clocking in and out of work using OpenHR's selfie and GPS-based attendance system.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: Welcome to OpenHRApp — Your First Steps
item.description: Complete guide to OpenHR's selfie-based attendance system with GPS location verification, office and factory clock-in modes.
item.dc:creator: Monirul Islam

item.title: The Ultimate "No-Install" HRMS: High-Precision Attendance Without the App Store Headache
item.description: Ditch the bulky downloads and expensive licenses. Our Open HR App uses modern PWA (Progressive Web App) technology to provide a high-precision, "no-install" attendance system. From Geofencing with GPS coordinates to biometric selfie verification, we’ve built a tool that ensures accountability for teams in the office or the field. Whether you host it yourself via GitHub or use our managed service at OpenHRApp.com, get enterprise-level leave workflows and daily reporting for free.
item.dc:creator: Admin

item.title: Attendance Management
item.description: Track employee attendance with selfie-based check-in, GPS verification, and real-time dashboards. Supports office and factory shift modes.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: Leave Management
item.description: Streamline leave requests, approvals, and balance tracking. Configure custom leave types with automatic calculations.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: Performance Reviews
item.description: Run structured performance reviews with self-assessment, manager evaluation, and HR finalization. Customizable competencies and rating scales.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: GPS & Location Verification
item.description: Verify employee attendance with GPS location tracking. Ideal for remote teams and field workers.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: Biometric Selfie Verification
item.description: Prevent buddy punching with selfie-based attendance verification. Photo evidence ensures authentic check-ins. No special hardware needed.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: Employee Directory
item.description: Manage employee profiles, departments, and org structure in one place. Role-based access, bulk import, and searchable directory.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team

item.title: Reports & Analytics
item.description: Generate attendance reports, leave utilization analytics, and team performance insights. Interactive charts and CSV export.
item.dc:creator: OpenHR Team
